evals.expected_output: Parses the CSV via reconcile.py into (label, expected_value) pairs, generates a matching NL question per label, runs each through agami-query-database, diffs actual vs expected with currency/percentage/parens-tolerant normalization, and renders a markdown table with green matches and red mismatches plus drill-down receipts.

evals.prompt: Do these Tableau numbers match what agami says?
evals.expected_output: Asks the user via AskUserQuestion for the CSV path or pasted table. Once provided, runs the standard reconcile pipeline. On any mismatch, surfaces the receipt drill-down so the user can identify the definitional disagreement (gross vs net, refunds in/out, FX rate timing) rather than treating the mismatch as a bug.
